betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Power Core (High)§f

§aThe ultimate late-game modular power storage component!§f

The §bPower Core (High)§f is the third and final tier of crafting core in the RFTools Power progression suite. It is the dense, high-capacity focal point required to build massive energy storage grids.

§6Usage§f:
§b• Crafting Component§f: Used to construct the elite §9Powercell (High)§f, allowing you to buffer huge volumes of power.
§b• Heavy Engineering§f: Necessary for bases powered by massive reactors (such as HBM nuclear or fusion reactors) that require massive throughput buffers.

§6Crafting§f:
§eCrafted using elite resources:§f
§b• 1× Redstone Block§f (center)
§b• 1× Diamond§f & §b1× Emerald§f (cardinals or top/bottom)
§b• 4× Redstone§f (or §bDimensional Shards§f in corners/cardinals depending on recipe loaded)

§6Strategic Role§f:
Power Core (High) is the build bottleneck for late-game energy. Once your base has reached the stage of running fusion reactors or multi-reactor arrays, you will need dozens of these cores to surround your upgraded Powercells and push the transfer rate up to keep up with sustained reactor output.

§eTip§f: Stockpile Diamonds and Emeralds early — a single Powercell (High) upgrade consumes §e4 cores§f, and a 9×9×9 network will burn through hundreds.
